messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
BL-506 — Pipeline board LINKS section lists oldest ticket first: order the links most-recent (highest ticket number) first, numeric-aware
What it solves: The board's LINKS section renders oldest-first (BL-001, BL-002, BL-003, ...) because
buildLinks (extension/src/concierge/pipelineBoard.ts, ~L357-364) sorts every link by id STRING
ascending across all four sources (active rows, parked, recently-closed, root-intake):
    links.sort((a, b) => a.id.lo…
Approval context: Draining the human's own root-intake follow-up (backlog/INTAKE-pipeline-board-links-order.md: "the ordering of the yaml links has to go from most recent"). What needs your sign-off is the meaning of "most recent" in the LINKS section: the feature pins it to highest ticket NUMBER first, numeric-awar…
BL-506 needs your approval before it can proceed. Reply here with "approve BL-506" (or "reject BL-506 <reason>") to act.
